items.original_title: Iran's Gulf islands: targets in latest fight over Hormuz
items.rss_summary:
A US missile struck the Iranian island of Larak on Wednesday, the Tasnim news agency reported, in the latest attack to target the Islamic republic's islands in and around the Strait of Hormuz.
- Larak - 
This small island occupies a particularly strategic position at the narrowest point of the Strait of Hormuz, the key shipping route that Iran has choked shut.

items.title: США нанесли удар по иранскому острову: стоимость войны составила 37,5 млрд долларов
items.original_title: US hits Iranian island, says war cost at $37.5 bn
items.rss_summary:
The US military struck Iran's Larak Island in the Strait of Hormuz on Wednesday, after President Donald Trump warned he was "not finished" with a war that has already cost Washington $37.5 billion.
Critics have pointed to the cost of the war, which Pentagon chief Pete Hegseth said on Tuesday had soared to $37.5 billion, defending a request for tens of billions in additional funding for the military.

items.title: Бессент из Министерства финансов приветствует реформы Пакистана и призывает вернуться на рынки капитала
items.original_title: Treasury's Bessent welcomes Pakistan's reforms, push to return to capital markets
items.rss_summary: By Andrea ShalalWASHINGTON, July 22 (Reuters) - U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent met Pakistan's finance minister, Muhammad Aurangzeb, on Tuesday and welcomed the country's progress in implementing economic reforms and laying the groundwork for a return to international capital markets, Treasury said in a statement on Wednesday.The statement did not address Pakistan's request for a $10 billion exchange stabilization facility, first reported by Reuters.
